notes: Adds hover feedback, a click cursor, and state-aware action guidance to the Clipboard monitoring switch.
Adds a built-in DingDong Configure Skill so Agents can discover and manage prompts, Skills, MCP servers, trigger groups, project policies, and clipboard organization.
Exposes public trigger-group CRUD routes and keeps enabled resources synchronized into supported native Agent directories.
Redesigns clipboard category management with clearer hierarchy, semantic icons, compact actions, and correctly clipped macOS modal overlays.
Adds Windows-native context menus, Control-key shortcut hints, adaptive taskbar-aware tray artwork, and persistent unread attention flashing with localized tooltip counts.
Lets Windows own the popup frame while macOS retains DingDong's rounded callout surface.
Refreshes the website product model and standardizes resource transfer and filter controls across desktop surfaces.
Publishes separate Apple Silicon and Intel macOS packages; Intel macOS and Windows packages remain marked beta.
